alreadyExists: Pattern "{pattern}" already has a matching rule
maxRules: You can add up to 100 allowed model rules
ruleMoved: This rule changed while you were editing. Please try again.
description: Define which models this provider supports. Requests for models not matching any rule will skip this provider. Leave empty to allow all models.
emptyState: No allowed model rules yet. Without rules, all models are accepted.
regexUnsafe: Regex pattern has potential ReDoS risk
